title: McJtyLib Refilmed
body:
McJtyLib Refilmed is a McJtyLib fork with some bug fixes and changes.

Currently, the fixes and changes that this fork contains are:

- Backported the JEI overlap issue fix.
 

McJtyLib Refilmed is for 1.12.2 only.

You can support the original auther by pleding at https://www.patreon.com/McJty

Thanks!

Please use "Issues" page to post the problems you get with the mod or if you have any suggestions to it.
